name: Test invalid user ID format returns error
description:
Verify invalid user ID format is rejected

        Expected:
        - 400/422 Validation Error or 404 Not Found
descriptionHtml:
Verify invalid user ID format is rejected

    Expected:
    - 400/422 Validation Error or 404 Not Found
statusTrace:
self = <test_user_management.TestUserManagementEdgeCases object at 0x7a954dd5b2b0>, admin_client = <utils.api_clientv2.APIClient object at 0x7a954da981f0>

    @allure.story("Invalid User ID")
    @allure.title("Test invalid user ID format returns error")
    def test_get_user_invalid_id_format(self, admin_client):
        """
        Verify invalid user ID format is rejected
    
        Expected:
        - 400/422 Validation Error or 404 Not Found
        """
        invalid_user_id = "invalid_id_string"
    
        endpoint = settings.USER_GET.replace("{user_id}", invalid_user_id)
        response = admin_client.get(endpoint)
    
>       assert response.status_code in [400, 404, 422], (
            f"Invalid user ID should return 400/404/422, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Invalid user ID should return 400/404/422, got 403: {"detail":{"message":"You do not have permission to perform this action.","code":"AUTHORIZATION_ERROR","timestamp":1776416764.5785458,"details":null}}
E       assert 403 in [400, 404, 422]
E        +  where 403 = <Response [403 Forbidden]>.status_code

test_api_v2/test_auth/test_user_management.py:439: AssertionError
